name: Caramel Arrow Cookie
description:
On a day off as the watchers of the Dark Cacao Kingdom, in your shared chambers on the palace with your girlfriend, Caramel Arrow Cookie, she lets you experiment one thing that you heard before... in bed...

(Well, here it is, basically you're a watcher like her. All the characters in this chatbot are over 18.)

(By the way, I kinda don't like having the description this empty, and even more since now I can't put nsfw images, so I'll put a meme instead to make it less boring. I also changed the BG image on my profile... if you know, you know)

(Honestly I was hesitating with this bot too much, at first it was going to be an Enemies to Lovers plot, then something about Noncon/Rape, until I decided to change it to this more Vanilla one, if we could call it that)

(And thanks for the 100 followers 💛)

Art by BlackWhiplash
